productDisplayName: 2go Active Gear USA Men Black Roger Lounge Pants
description: Composition Black lounge pants made of performance premium cotton, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, two insert pockets on the sides, printed brand logo on left leg, contrast panel stitched to the back, piping on the sides and a mobile pouch inside the left insert pocket Fit Regular Wash careMachine wash in cold water Do not bleach Tumble dry on low heat Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on print Relax in comfort in these pants from 2Go. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while the drawstring allows you to further customise the fit. Wear when you're relaxing at home, or team it with t-shirts and fitness shoes for a sweat-free workout session. Model statistics The product is a size 32, length 42" on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
